name: Grandma's Cranberry Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cranberries and sugar in a bowl.
2. Dissolve the Jell-O in hot water; add pineapple juice; chill until partially set.
3. Add the cranberry mixture, pineapple, walnuts, and celery to the chilled Jell-O mixture.
4. Pour into a mold and refrigerate until firm.
5. Serves 6.
Note: To double the recipe, use 1 cherry and 1 lemon Jell-O, 1 whole package of cranberries. Double the other ingredients as well.
